title: Blockstates +
description: Adding textures to blockstates throughout the game
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/YPodM4f.png)
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/FgypubrVmn)
***

### **📋 About**

Blockstates + makes use of the many [Blockstates](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Block_states) Minecraft has and gives them unique textures.

The pack is made for Minecraft Version 1.16-1.21 and might not work with any other version

***

### **✅ Recommendations**
If you want to use Blockstates + and [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x), make sure to check out Scutoel's add-on:

[Blockstates Faithful 32](https://github.com/scutoel/Blockstates-Faithful32)
***
